Metadata.description: Spectr builds a sovereign Norwegian ISR platform — autonomous, EW-resilient aerial systems and command software.

Footer.tagline: Autonomous ISR for the comms-denied battlefield.

Home.reconDescription: Long-range, autonomous ISR platform for continuous surveillance — without ground infrastructure or GPS dependency.
Home.centurionDescription: One sovereign command platform with AI-assisted decision support, multi-drone coordination, and mission staging.
Home.norwayDescription: Spectr designs and produces ISR hardware and Centurion command software in Norway, with NATO-compatible allied components and no critical dependency on non-allied suppliers.
Home.investorDescription: Follow Spectr's company updates, operating milestones, and long-term aerospace systems roadmap.
Home.careersDescription: Build aerospace systems and operational software for teams working in demanding real-world environments.

Products.title: Products
Products.heroDescription: RECON for autonomous ISR. CENTURION for sovereign mission command. Built and controlled from Norway.
Products.reconExtra: The operator defines the mission in Centurion. RECON takes off vertically, cruises autonomously, and returns — even when GPS and communications are down.
Products.specSheetDescription: Platform dimensions, performance targets, payload configuration, and operating profile for RECON.

About.title: About Us
About.paragraph1: Spectr builds a sovereign Norwegian ISR platform — autonomous, EW-resilient, and produced in Norway at a fraction of the cost of today's systems.
About.paragraph2: In-house in Norway: vacuum-formed carbon fiber airframes, avionics, flight controllers, onboard computers, telemetry radios, battery pack design, Centurion software, and final assembly. Allied suppliers for EO/IR gimbals, battery cells, and motors only. NDAA Section 889 compatible by design.

manufacturing.name: Produced In-House
manufacturing.text: Airframes in vacuum-formed carbon fiber composite, avionics and flight controllers, onboard computers, telemetry radios, battery pack design with BMS and thermal management, Centurion software, and final assembly — all in Norway.

platforms.name: RECON
platforms.text: A VTOL fixed-wing ISR platform for continuous surveillance over large areas. Autonomous mission execution in GNSS-denied and comms-denied environments. Prototype assembled — ground testing ongoing.

avionics.name: GNSS-Denied Stack
avionics.text: Visual-Inertial Odometry in development, terrain-referenced navigation on the roadmap, and tactical-grade INS as fallback. Custom flight controllers, power-dense battery packs, and secure onboard systems built to NATO STANAG principles.

2024.title: Early systems work
2024.text: Spectr began with a focus on practical aerial systems, field handling, and hardware that could support real operational workflows.

2025.title: RECON takes shape
2025.text: The team refined a mission-configurable reconnaissance UAV direction around sensing, operator needs, and deployment support.

2026.title: Prototype and demo readiness
2026.text: RECON prototype assembled with ground testing ongoing. Centurion v0.1 operational with mission staging and AI chat — demo-ready.

Careers.title: Join Our Mission
Careers.intro: Spectr is building mission-ready aerospace systems and operational software from Norway.
Careers.paragraph1: We are looking for people who care about practical engineering, disciplined execution, and technology that can hold up outside the lab.
Careers.paragraph2: If you want to work across aerospace hardware, operator workflow, and secure software systems, we want to hear from you.

aerospace.title: Aerospace systems
aerospace.text: Work on UAV platforms, field-ready hardware, and the systems that support demanding operational use.

software.title: Operational software
software.text: Build command interfaces, mission workflows, and tools that help operators keep context when decisions matter.

norway.title: Norwegian capability
norway.text: Help develop critical technology under national control, with a focus on reliability, security, and real deployment needs.

Security.title: Security
Security.description: Spectr security, confidentiality, Norwegian ownership, and controlled infrastructure commitments.
Security.legalText1: Our operations are structured in accordance with the Norwegian Security Act (sikkerhetsloven) and the Business Security Regulation (virksomhetsikkerhetsforskriften § 83). We maintain organisational and technical safeguards for classified information and critical infrastructure under Norwegian law.
Security.legalText2: We believe critical technology should be developed, owned, and controlled locally — to safeguard Norwegian interests for the long term.
Security.nationalControl: We believe critical technology should be developed under full national control.

Investor.title: Investor Relations
Investor.intro: Follow Spectr's company updates, operating milestones, and long-term aerospace systems roadmap.
Investor.headline: Sovereign ISR capability from Norway.
Investor.paragraph1: Spectr is developing RECON — an autonomous, EW-resilient ISR platform — and Centurion, a sovereign command platform for multi-drone mission staging and AI-assisted decision support.
Investor.paragraph2: Investor relations inquiries are handled directly by the Spectr team. We share company materials, milestone updates, and strategic context with qualified stakeholders.
Investor.quote: The West needs ISR drones that see everything — and cannot be knocked out.

CookieConsent.label: Cookie notice
CookieConsent.title: Spectr uses cookies to run and improve this website.
CookieConsent.description: We use essential cookies to remember your choices and keep the site working. With your permission, we may also use analytics or similar tools to understand website usage. You can read more in our Privacy Policy.
